opportunities.title: Godzilla Enters Marvel Multiverse RPG: How Kaiju-Scale Stats Actually Work
opportunities.why_now: Marvel Multiverse RPG just announced a Godzilla crossover, raising immediate rules questions about scale and damage caps.
opportunities.angle: Rules breakdown: compare existing Marvel Multiverse RPG's size/scale mechanics against what a kaiju-tier stat block would require, citing the announcement directly.

opportunities.title: Deathbringer's Crowdfunding Numbers, Decoded: What Backers Are Actually Getting
opportunities.why_now: Deathbringer is trending across two EN World posts this week (designer interview + crowdfunding roundup), making it the hot new system to scrutinize.
opportunities.angle: Fact-check style breakdown of stretch goals and core mechanics pulled from the Professor Dungeon Master interview, written as 'here's what's confirmed vs. hype.'

opportunities.title: Monte Cook Games Adapts Between Earth and Sky: What Novel-to-TTRPG Conversions Usually Get Wrong
opportunities.why_now: MCG just announced the tie-in, giving a timely hook to discuss the mechanics of adapting prose fiction into playable rules.
opportunities.angle: Knowing analysis piece: survey how past novel-to-TTRPG adaptations handled setting fidelity vs. rules, predicting where this one will land.

opportunities.title: Arcana Unleashed's New Factions: A Rules-First Look at What Backgrounds Actually Grant
opportunities.why_now: The preview just dropped showing specific arcane factions and backgrounds, perfect for a mechanics-focused first look.
opportunities.angle: Direct breakdown of the previewed background bonuses/faction perks, comparing them line-by-line to existing 5E-style background design norms.

opportunities.title: This Week's TTRPG Crowdfunding Roundup: Which Projects Have Rules You Can Actually Trust Yet
opportunities.why_now: The July 15 crowdfunding digest bundles Deathbringer, Sly Flourish, and Gary's Appendix, giving a natural comparison piece.
opportunities.angle: Ranked/scored format: grade each crowdfunding project by how much actual rules text vs. concept art has been shown so far.
